title: roldana hartwegii var. hartwegii
intro: Roldana hartwegii var. hartwegii, also known as the Mexican tarragon or Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is a member of the daisy family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Roldana hartwegii var. hartwegii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
